case_title: VICTORIA GONZALEZ VS. PABLO CALICO LLC,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, VICTORIA AS TO DEFENDANT PABLO CALICO LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA CANA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, VICTORIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PABLO CALICO LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA CANA $5,004.25 PRINCIPAL, $26.52 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,255.77, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
